title: tecoma chinensis
intro: Tecoma chinensis, also known as Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the trumpet vine family (Bignoniaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tecoma chinensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Tecoma chinensis is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
